summary: tier5_score not persisted as a column on token_signals; would require schema change or top_factors JSON parsing pass to execute. Deferred — see H3 header docstring for remediation paths.
remediation: Option A: ALTER TABLE token_signals ADD COLUMN tier5_score NUMERIC, tier5_confidence NUMERIC; backfill from top_factors.
Option B: parse top_factors JSONB inline (works only for rows where Derivatives factor exists).
